mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID, MESSAGE, CONTENTS, TEMPERATURE, RAIN, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_DT FROM WEATHER_LOG ORDER BY INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE WEATHER_LOG SET MESSAGE = #{message}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, TEMPERATURE = #{temperature}, RAIN = #{rain}, UPDATE_USER_ID = 1, UPDATE_DT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}
